text.title: BA Knowledge Areas Detail Worked Example
text.summary: End-to-end walked example applying the knowledge-areas-detail methodology, producing a valid artefact per `02-output-contract.xml`.

section.title: End-to-end example
section.narrative: Transformation programme → KAR-0007 classifies as transformation → KA sequence KA-1 → KA-4 → KA-2 → KA-5 → KA-3 → KA-6 → per-KA owner + due → audit map shows 100% deliverables tied to SOX evidence rows.
